text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara's fatigue has really built up. I take her
to the infirmary to rest.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? But I'm not that tired, really!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I don't even know if I can nap! I'm... not a—yawn...—child anymore...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Snore...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? What was I doing just now? Um...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? Whoa, there's a bunch of fish swimming up
in the sky!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! It's a whole group of taiyaki fish! Ahahaha!
I'm gonna get 'em all!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! They're so tasty! I never knew taiyaki fish
could fly!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Or that this place existed! I gotta tell everyone!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Urara, Urara! We're just about to start our race!
Come quick!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
We're racing to the moon! You're going to be last
if you don't hurry!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh?! A race?! I totally forgot!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Awesome! I'm gonna run so fast! I'm gonna win for
sure!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: If we're going to the moon, then I better jump! URARA JUMP!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh! I'm running in the air! Wheee!
Heeheehee!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ah! I'm at the finish line! I'm number one! I won!
Yippee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right as Haru Urara breaks through the finish line
ribbon, the whole scene goes completely white.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ngh? I'm... back at school?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I feel absolutely amazing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara regains her strength and leaves the
nurse's office in great spirits.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Okay, now I just gotta make a break for the moon
and... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! I-I'm falling!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Nooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just when she thinks she's about to fall out of the
sky, the whole scene goes completely white.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hah... Huh? I'm back at school?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ugh. I just had a terrible dream!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Due to her nightmare, Haru Urara is unable to
properly rest.
